name: Jira
description: Create and manage issues, comments, and transitions in Jira
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The Jira API action to perform.

domain.label: Domain
domain.description: Jira Cloud domain. Used by: all actions.

projectKey.label: Project Key
projectKey.description: Jira project key. Used by: Create Issue.

issueType.label: Issue Type
issueType.description: Type of issue to create. Used by: Create Issue.

summary.label: Summary
summary.description: Issue summary/title. Used by: Create Issue.

description.label: Description
description.description: Issue description. Used by: Create Issue.

issueKey.label: Issue Key
issueKey.description: Jira issue key. Used by: Get Issue, Add Comment, Transition Issue.

commentBody.label: Comment Body
commentBody.description: Comment text. Used by: Add Comment.

transitionId.label: Transition ID
transitionId.description: Target transition ID. Used by: Transition Issue.
